Bash(cd /tmp && python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image
import sys

# 尝试读取第一帧并获取基本信息
try:
    img = Image.open\("猫咪工地_frame_1.jpg"\)
    print\(f"尺寸: {img.size}"\)
    print\(f"模式: {img.mode}"\)
    
    # 获取主要颜色
    from collections import Counter
    img_small = img.resize\(\(50, 50\)\)
    colors = img_small.getcolors\(maxcolors=100000\)
    if colors:
        sorted_colors = sorted\(colors, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True\)[:10]
        print\("\\n主要颜色:"\)
        for count, color in sorted_colors[:5]:
            print\(f"  RGB{color} - 占比 {count/2500*100:.1f}%"\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"错误: {e}"\)
EOF)

Bash(gh search repos --limit 50 "ai agent" --json name,owner,name,description,stargazerCount,url,isArchived,primaryLanguage,updatedAt,topics,licenseInfo --jq '.[]' 2>/dev/null || echo "API limit or error")

Bash(gh search repos --limit 50 "autonomous agent" --json name,owner,name,description,stargazerCount,url,isArchived,primaryLanguage,updatedAt,topics,licenseInfo --jq '.[]' 2>/dev/null || echo "API limit or error")
Bash(zsh -lc 'command -v cc-jishubu || which cc-jishubu || echo NOT_FOUND')
Bash(zsh -lc 'echo SHELL=$SHELL; which -a node; which -a npm; which -a claude; node -v; npm -v; claude --version')
Bash(zsh -lc 'command -v nvm || true; command -v fnm || true; command -v volta || true; command -v asdf || true; command -v brew || true')
Bash(zsh -lic 'source ~/.zshrc >/dev/null 2>&1; type cc-jishubu; which -a claude; which -a node; alias cc-jishubu')
Bash(zsh -lic 'source ~/.zshrc >/dev/null 2>&1; echo PATH=$PATH; node -v; npm -v; claude --version; which node; which npm; which claude')
Bash(zsh -lic 'n 22 && hash -r && source ~/.zshrc && node -v && which node && claude --version && which claude')
Bash(zsh -lic 'source ~/.zshrc >/dev/null 2>&1; node -v; claude --version; type cc-jishubu; timeout 10 cc-jishubu --version')
